column1: On his birthday Steve invented his colleagues for________drink after work.
I'd like to watch new film but at________moment I'm to busy preparing for the test.
James talked with someone on the phone in_________low voice covering the mouthpiece with his hand.
The tourists had covered 20 km on________foot and were really tired.
The car was driving at______high speed so we couldn't see the face of the driver.
The date and time are shown at_________bottom of your computer screen.
With______nod she gave us to understand that she was on our side.
By the time the fire brigade arrived the whole building was on______fire.
Me dream is to go on_________tour of Europe.
